title: Simple Map Reset
body:
# Simple Map Reset Plugin!
Hello to you all! I made my first PUBLIC plugin! It's a Map Reset Plugin that allows you to... Reset the map..! Duh... It works with WorldEdit and WorldGuard but you don't need them.

### How to Use
To disable the plugin from reseting your blocks. Do the command "/mapreset disable [player]" and your blocks no longer reset! (WorldGuard and WorldEdit don't reset)

To Re-enable block reseting, it's simple. Just Do the command "/mapreset enable [player]" and your blocks now reset!

To Clear the Map directly, Do the command "/mapreset clear" and all placed blocks that were placed by player's with block reseting enabled, past or present will reset.

To Reload the Config, Do the command "/mapresetpl reload"
There is only one thing in the config. And it's to decide on how frequently the map resets. Choose the time by doing something such as "1m | 1h | 1d | 1w | 1mo"

<details>
